headline: What Moody's (MCO)'s First Rating of Bitcoin‑Backed Municipal Bonds Means For Shareholders
summary: Moody’s recently assigned its first-ever credit rating to Bitcoin-backed revenue bonds issued through the New Hampshire Business Finance Authority’s Waverose Finance Project, giving up to US$100,000,000 of 2029 bonds a provisional Ba2 rating backed by Bitcoin collateral custodied by BitGo Bank & Trust. This move extends Moody’s ratings framework into crypto-collateralized municipal debt, highlighting how traditional credit analysis is being applied to digital-asset-backed securities. Next,...
